data.title: Translational Diligence: IAIP / Sepsis
data.executive_summary: Translational hypothesis with biomarker support and limited late-stage clinical validation.
data.conclusion: IAIP biology is plausible in sepsis pathophysiology, but interventional evidence remains early and trial design risk is high.
data.top_risk: Heterogeneous sepsis populations and endpoint variability
